content_body: We had never been on a cabin getaway but this was the most exciting time we ever had! The weather was perfect when the fog lifted, and the view was so tranquil in the mornings. The kitchen allowed everyone to be in there at the same time, and we got to see nature up close when a family of deer would come out every morning. We also went down to see the river! The experience for all who came with us was one of relaxed enjoyment! Thank you Cabins Rentals of Georgia for a great birthday retreat!
title: The Best Cabin Getaway
